files.CLAUDE.md:
# ledgerd — Agent Instructions

A long-lived node service mid-migration away from callbacks and MySQL.

## Hard requirements

- Database access goes through `lib/db/pool.js`; direct driver connections are forbidden.
- Whenever `scripts/deploy.sh` changes, update `docs/legacy/runbook.md` in the same change; deploy steps must never drift from the runbook.

commits.message: chore: import ledgerd from the old monorepo

files.docs/adr/0001-callback-continuations.md:
# 0001 — Callback-style continuations for job scheduling

Status: Superseded by ADR 0003

## Context

The original scheduler predates promise support in our runtime.

## Decision

Job scheduling in `lib/jobs/scheduler.js` passes continuation callbacks;
each job invokes `done(err)` when it completes.
files.docs/adr/0002-mysql-storage.md:
# 0002 — MySQL as the ledger store

Status: Superseded by ADR 0004

## Context

MySQL was the only managed database our first host offered.

## Decision

The ledger persists to MySQL through the shared pool in `lib/db/pool.js`.
files.docs/adr/0003-promise-based-scheduling.m:
# 0003 — Promise-based job scheduling

Status: Accepted

## Context

Callback-style continuations in the scheduler produced unrecoverable nested
error handling; ADR 0001 is superseded by this decision.

## Decision

All job scheduling in `lib/jobs/scheduler.js` must use promises with
async/await; callback-style continuation passing must not be reintroduced.
files.docs/adr/0004-postgres-ledger-store.md:
# 0004 — Postgres as the ledger store

Status: Accepted

## Context

The MySQL ledger (ADR 0002) lacked transactional DDL and is superseded by
this decision.

## Decision

The ledger persists to Postgres; `lib/db/pool.js` must open connections
through the `pg` pool only, and the `mysql2` driver must not be
reintroduced.

commits.message: docs(adr): backfill scheduling and storage decision records

refactor: promise-based scheduler (removes callback continuations)

The scheduler in `lib/jobs/scheduler.js` no longer accepts callback continuations; jobs must return promises.

chore: archive legacy runbook

The legacy runbook moved to the ops wiki; deploy notes live there.

feat: migrate ledger store to postgres (replaces mysql driver)

Switched to the `pg` pool in `lib/db/pool.js` instead of `mysql2`.

fix: scheduler regression after promise migration

Restores job retry order broken by the promise migration.

description: A long-lived service mid-migration: superseded ADR chains (callbacks → promises, MySQL → Postgres) and a stale runbook anchor.
